api.processing: ⏳ Data is being prepared, please try again later.
api.network: 🔌 API connection failed, please try again later.
api.rate_limit: ⏱️ Rate limit exceeded, please try again later.
api.generic: ❌ Query failed, please try again later.

validation.date_format: Invalid date format. Please use YYYY-MM-DD (e.g., 2025-07-01).
validation.problem_ids_empty: Please provide at least one problem ID.
validation.too_many_problems: You can query up to 20 problems at once.
validation.problem_not_found: No valid problems found. Please check the problem IDs or ensure they are public.
validation.no_description: Problem not found or has no description content.
validation.no_submissions: No submissions found for user **{username}**. Please check the username.
validation.content_truncated: (Content truncated, please visit the website for the full problem.)
validation.no_query_provided: Please provide at least a problem description (query) or problem ID (problem).

config.not_configured: Daily challenge channel not configured yet. Use /config channel:<channel> to get started.
config.reset_conflict: `reset` cannot be used with other configuration parameters.
config.time_format_error: Invalid time format. Please use HH:MM (e.g., 08:00 or 23:59).
config.first_setup_required:
You must specify the `channel` parameter for initial setup.
Example: `/config channel:#general time:08:00 timezone:UTC+8`
config.settings_error: An error occurred while saving settings. Please try again later.
config.permission_denied: You need the **Manage Server** permission to use this command.
config.dm_restricted: This command cannot be used in direct messages.
config.not_setup: This server has no settings to reset.

reset.wrong_user: This action is only available to the original requester.
reset.expired: This confirmation has expired. Please use /config reset:True again.
reset.permission_denied: You need the **Manage Server** permission to perform this action.
reset.error: An error occurred while resetting settings. Please try again later.
reset.success: ✅ All settings have been reset and scheduling has been stopped.
reset.confirm_message: ⚠️ Are you sure you want to reset all settings for this server? This will stop the daily challenge schedule.

embed.instructions_text: Click the buttons below to view detailed information for each problem.

llm.duplicate_translate: Processing your translation request, please wait...
llm.duplicate_inspire: Processing your inspiration request, please wait...
llm.translation_not_enabled: LLM translation feature is not enabled.
llm.inspire_not_enabled: LLM inspiration feature is not enabled.

daily.date: Query daily challenge for a specific date (YYYY-MM-DD format), defaults to today, earliest 2020-04-01
daily.public: Whether to show the reply publicly (default: private)

daily_cn.date: Query daily challenge for a specific date (YYYY-MM-DD format), defaults to today, earliest 2020-04-01
daily_cn.public: Whether to show the reply publicly (default: private)

problem.problem_ids: Problem IDs, comma-separated (e.g., 1, two-sum, abc321_a, atcoder:abc321_a)
problem.public: Whether to show the reply publicly (default: private)
problem.title: Custom title (replaces default title in multi-problem mode, max 100 characters)
problem.message: Optional personal message or note (max 500 characters)
problem.source: Problem source (e.g., leetcode/atcoder/codeforces), or use source: prefix before problem ID

config.description: Configure all LeetCode Daily Challenge settings
config.reset: Reset all settings and stop scheduling (requires confirmation)

recent.description: View recent submissions for a LeetCode user (LCUS only)
recent.limit: Number of problems to display (default 20, max 50)
recent.public: Whether to show the reply publicly (default: private)

similar.query: Problem description or keywords (optional if problem is specified)
similar.public: Whether to show the reply publicly (default: private)
